---
title: "Weather App"
subtitle: "Frontend"
description: "A weather forecast site using the Visual Crossing API"
author: Abdullah Zeeshan
date: 2024-09-16
image: ../utils/weather-app.png
categories:
  - JavaScript (Asynchronous )
  - API
reading-time: true
toc: true
fig-align: center
fig-cap-location: bottom
---

<span class="listing-btn-group">
<a href="https://4bdullah7eeshan.github.io/weather-app/" class="btn" role="button">{{< fa globe >}} Live</a> 
<a href="https://github.com/4bdullah7eeshan/weather-app" class="btn" role="button">{{< iconify fa github >}} Source Code</a>
</span>
